goal: Phase 1 trigger-first revision-first local state model for Orun
notes: Task 0015 (M4 PR-B verifier) verified PASS on 2026-05-30. PR #160 squash-merged into main as commit d51e828 — Task 0014: M4 PR-B — internal/executionstate bridge + EXDEV fallback. Bridge{Store, LegacyRoot, MirrorMode, Now}.MirrorRunnerOutput shipped with hardlink-with-copy-fallback, portable EXDEV detection (errors.Is(syscall.EXDEV) + *os.LinkError type-assertion), structured bridge-mirror-failed event emission, idempotent short-circuit, sequence allocation seq=2 reserved for execution-created.

Coverage on PR #160 final: internal/executionstate=90.0% (exact floor held; bridge.go fully exercised); internal/statestore=95.7% (lifted from 95.4% via the two additive helpers' tests); internal/revision=90.4% (unchanged). All quality gates green: go build/vet, go test -race ./..., make test-state-redesign. Both required CI checks SUCCESS at log level on final head SHA after verifier-side commit (CI / Orun Plan run 26677835038; Harness dry-run guard run 26677835039).

Verifier adjudications on PR #160 (accepted with Risk Notes; no spec proposal filed): (1) MirrorMode trinary surface (Auto / Hardlink / Copy) — Auto is zero value matching §M4 verbatim; Hardlink is needed for the EXDEV emission test and drift detection; Copy pre-positions remote drivers (M5+). Implementation-plan.md §M4 reads as a single mode but the trinary surface is additive over the spec, not contradictory. Renaming is non-breaking source-level. (2) bridge-mirror-failed payload schema {executionKey, revisionKey, legacyExecId, artifact, stage, mode, error} with stage in {read-source, read-dest, translate-dest, mkdir-dest, remove-dest, link, copy} fixed in code; data-model.md §9 left it open. Schema is well-formed and additive-friendly. Should be pinned in §9 before any second consumer (metrics, orun status) lands during M5.b.

M4 milestone FULLY CLOSED with this merge. internal/executionstate is feature-complete for Phase 1: model + writer (PR-A) + resolver-with-legacy-fallback (PR-A) + bridge (PR-B). Production-caller wiring (runner → MirrorRunnerOutput, CLI rewire) is M5. Resolver legacy-fallback carries convergence burden until M5.b lands.

Next = **Task 0016 = M5.a implementer** per implementation-plan.md §M5. Scope: orun plan rewire — always resolve trigger, always write revision-first layout, preserve -o, write compat aliases, emit new summary block. Scope EXCLUDES orun run rewire (M5.b), orun status/logs/describe (M5.c), and orun state migrate (M5.d).

Risk Notes carried into M5: (a) bridge-mirror-failed payload schema not yet pinned in data-model.md §9 — pin during M5.b runner wiring before any second consumer. (b) MirrorRunnerOutput has no production callers until M5.b — resolver legacy-fallback is the convergence path. (c) MirrorModeHardlink is currently a test/drift-detection mode; if no production caller emerges by M6, fold into a debug flag. (d) emitFailure is best-effort; events-dir-unwritable failures are silently dropped — M5+ should add stderr/metric fallback. (e) Event-sequence retry budget of 32 is acceptable for single-writer Phase 1; re-evaluate when remote drivers come online. (f) Coverage at exact 90.0% floor — small refactors that delete a covered branch could trip the gate.

Persistent local environment quirk (NOT a regression): kiox -- orun plan --changed --intent examples/intent.yaml occasionally fails on composition-cache resolution. Reproduces sporadically since Task 0001 on main and PR branches. CI passes the same invocation; CI is authoritative.
